values.title: Handcrafted Excellence
values.description: Every piece is meticulously crafted by our master artisans using time-honored techniques.

values.title: Ethically Sourced
values.description: We source only conflict-free diamonds and responsibly mined precious metals.

values.title: Custom Designs
values.description: Work directly with our designers to create a one-of-a-kind piece that tells your story.

values.title: Lifetime Warranty
values.description: Every Lumina piece comes with a lifetime warranty and complimentary annual cleaning.

values.title: GIA Certified
values.description: All diamonds and gemstones are independently certified by the Gemological Institute of America.

values.title: Luxury Packaging
values.description: Each piece arrives in our signature velvet box with a certificate of authenticity.

values.title: Lumina Fine Jewelry
values.hero_description: Discover exquisite jewelry that captures light and imagination. Each Lumina piece is a testament to artistry, quality, and the enduring beauty of precious materials.
values.cta_description: From engagement rings to statement necklaces, explore our collections and discover jewelry that speaks to your unique style.

values.title: Eternal Garden
values.body: Inspired by the delicate beauty of nature in bloom, the Eternal Garden collection features intricate floral motifs rendered in 18k gold with precious gemstone accents. Each piece captures the ephemeral beauty of a garden in perpetual spring.

image.alt: Delicate gold jewelry with floral design
image.title: Eternal Garden Collection

values.title: Midnight Sky
values.body: The Midnight Sky collection draws inspiration from the celestial heavens. Sapphires and diamonds are set in platinum to evoke the twinkling beauty of a starlit night. Bold yet elegant, these pieces command attention at any formal occasion.

values.title: Golden Hour
values.body: Warm tones and fluid lines define the Golden Hour collection. Featuring yellow gold and citrine, these pieces capture the magic of sunset light. Perfect for everyday elegance with a touch of glamour.

values.title: Aurora Engagement Ring
values.body: A breathtaking solitaire featuring a 1.5 carat round brilliant diamond set in a delicate platinum band with pavé accents. The Aurora ring captures light from every angle, creating a mesmerizing display of fire and brilliance.

image.alt: Diamond engagement ring on white surface
image.title: Aurora Engagement Ring

values.title: Celestial Pendant Necklace
values.body: A stunning blue sapphire surrounded by a halo of micro-pavé diamonds, suspended from a delicate platinum chain. This pendant evokes the mystery of a midnight sky and adds sophistication to any ensemble.

values.title: Soleil Tennis Bracelet
values.body: A classic tennis bracelet reimagined with alternating citrines and diamonds set in warm 18k yellow gold. The Soleil bracelet brings a modern twist to timeless elegance, perfect for both casual and formal occasions.

values.title: Flora Drop Earrings
values.body: Delicate drop earrings featuring hand-carved rose gold petals with emerald centers. These earrings sway gently with movement, creating an enchanting play of light and color inspired by spring blooms.

values.title: Luna Cuff Bracelet
values.body: A bold statement piece featuring a crescent moon motif adorned with moonstones and diamonds. The Luna cuff is handcrafted in sterling silver with a polished finish that catches light beautifully.

values.title: Isabella Santos
values.body: A third-generation jewelry artisan, Isabella brings decades of family tradition to every piece she creates. Trained in Florence, Italy, her work blends classical European techniques with contemporary design sensibilities. She specializes in hand-engraving and filigree work.

values.title: James Chen
values.body: James is our lead stone setter, known for his precision and attention to detail. With a background in engineering and gemology, he brings a scientific approach to the art of stone setting, ensuring every gem is securely and beautifully placed.

values.title: Amara Okafor
values.body: Amara is our creative director and lead designer, whose bold vision has shaped Lumina's most iconic collections. Drawing inspiration from architecture, nature, and African art traditions, she creates designs that are both modern and timeless.

values.title: About Lumina Fine Jewelry
values.body:
Founded in 2001, Lumina Fine Jewelry began with a simple belief: that exceptional jewelry should be accessible to those who appreciate true craftsmanship. Our atelier brings together master artisans from around the world, each contributing their unique expertise to create pieces of enduring beauty.

Our Philosophy

We believe that fine jewelry is more than adornment. It marks life's most precious moments, carries stories across generations, and celebrates the artistry of human hands working with nature's most beautiful materials.

Sustainability

Every Lumina piece is crafted with responsibility. We use only recycled precious metals, conflict-free diamonds, and ethically sourced gemstones, ensuring that beauty never comes at the cost of our planet or its people.

values.title: Contact Lumina
values.body:
We'd love to help you find or create the perfect piece. Visit our showroom or schedule a private consultation with one of our design experts.

Showroom Hours

Monday - Saturday: 10:00 AM - 7:00 PM
Sunday: By appointment only
